Charles Ahn
Portfolio

Selected recent work across research and personal builds.

Teleoperated 360 Video Capture of Beehives for Scientific Visualization in VR
NEW

This project provides a framework for capturing and analyzing bee activity using commercially available 360◦ cameras and hardware to create an immersive VR experience.

Social XR Interface Study

Prototype and evaluate collaborative virtual workflows for distributed teams.

Altoids Tin Music Player
NEW

Pocket iPod-style player with Pi Zero 2 W, Pimoroni Headphone HAT, and a rotary dial in an Altoids tin.

Personal Site Iteration

Built an Astro-powered portfolio focused on speed, accessibility, and clear storytelling.

Weekend IoT Sensor Rig

Low-cost environmental monitor with custom enclosure and dashboard logging.
